recommendations.action: Revamp the account suspension system to reduce false positives by improving AI accuracy and adding human review for flagged accounts
recommendations.evidence: High volume of users report wrongful account suspensions without clear violations, causing frustration and loss of trust
recommendations.impact: Fewer wrongful account lockouts, clearer appeals, and faster recovery for legitimate users

recommendations.action: Fix login and authentication bugs causing users to be unable to access accounts despite correct credentials, including password reset failures
recommendations.evidence: Users report being locked out with correct passwords and failed password reset flows, leading to account access loss
recommendations.impact: Improve user retention and reduce support tickets by ensuring reliable login and recovery processes

recommendations.action: Resolve app crashes and performance issues related to content posting, caption saving, and media playback
recommendations.evidence: Frequent reports of crashes, captions not saving, drafts expiring quickly, and stalled playback of already loaded content
recommendations.impact: Enhance user experience and reduce frustration during core content creation and consumption flows

recommendations.action: Rework the Reels and Following feed algorithm to show all posts from followed accounts without excessive ads and repeated ad sequences
recommendations.evidence: Users complain about missing posts from followed accounts and overwhelming ad frequency disrupting feed usability
recommendations.impact: Increase user engagement and satisfaction by restoring expected feed behavior and reducing ad fatigue

recommendations.action: Add user controls to disable or opt out of AI-generated features such as AI summaries on reels and AI filters
recommendations.evidence: Many users express frustration with forced AI features degrading app enjoyment and want ability to turn them off
recommendations.impact: Improve user satisfaction and retention by respecting user preferences and reducing unwanted AI interference

recommendations.action: Improve messaging UI by restoring prioritized friend lists for sending DMs and allow disabling of automated 'you're now friends' messages
recommendations.evidence: Users find it harder to send messages due to changed friend sorting and are annoyed by unwanted automated messages
recommendations.impact: Streamline messaging workflows and reduce user frustration in communication features

recommendations.action: Fix privacy setting synchronization issues between user interface and backend to ensure privacy controls are respected and consistent
recommendations.evidence: Reports of privacy settings not applying correctly, causing restricted account states and broken UI loops
recommendations.impact: Restore user trust in privacy controls and prevent confusing or restrictive account states

recommendations.action: Enhance content moderation by improving AI detection accuracy and providing better human support for harassment and hate speech reports
recommendations.evidence: Users report unchecked abusive content and inability to reach real support for moderation issues
recommendations.impact: Create safer community environment and increase user trust in platform moderation

recommendations.action: Add a cancel button for video loading processes to improve user control and reduce annoyance from persistent loading notifications
recommendations.evidence: Users find loading notifications irritating and want ability to cancel video uploads or loads
recommendations.impact: Improve user experience by giving more control over media loading

recommendations.action: Restore missing creator tools features such as Repost and Discover Projects and improve UI consistency for scheduling and text layers
recommendations.evidence: Creators report missing features and UI inconsistencies affecting content management and brand collaborations
recommendations.impact: Support creator growth and satisfaction by providing reliable and complete toolsets

recommendations.action: Reduce ad frequency and improve ad labeling visibility to balance monetization with user experience
recommendations.evidence: Users complain about excessive ads and poor ad disclosure harming platform enjoyment
recommendations.impact: Maintain revenue while improving user retention and perception of the platform
